postCreateCommand:
curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.7/install.sh | bash && npm install -g pnpm && ([ -d ~/.oh-my-zsh/custom/themes/powerlevel10k ] || git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/romkatv/powerlevel10k.git ~/.oh-my-zsh/custom/themes/powerlevel10k) && sed -i 's/^ZSH_THEME=.*/ZSH_THEME="powerlevel10k\/powerlevel10k"/' ~/.zshrc && sed -i 's/^plugins=.*/plugins=(git node npm nvm pnpm)/' ~/.zshrc && sudo chsh -s $(which zsh) node && (grep -q 'exec /usr/bin/zsh' ~/.bashrc || echo '[ -t 1 ] && exec /usr/bin/zsh' >> ~/.bashrc) && (grep -q 'NVM_DIR' ~/.zshrc || echo '
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion"' >> ~/.zshrc)
